internal_issues.description: WIN-044 code_analysis missing monitoring_evidence, relabels_standard_evidence, derives_from_dome_evidence fields
SEC-6.6: {{TOTAL_WINS}} template in V51.0 historical formula rendered as 70/74=94.6% != 95.2%. Fixed with hardcoded historical 67/(67+4)=94.4%, noting dome labeled it 95.2%.
SEC-6.6: honest accuracy formula used stale denominator 76 (70/76=92%, not 88%). Fixed with {{HONEST_ACCURACY_DENOM}} and {{HONEST_ACCURACY}} templates.
SEC-6.6 dedup table: 29 WINs unclustered hardcoded (stale from 67-WIN era). With 70 WINs, 32 are unclustered. Fixed to 32.
HOL-TONE: 'if worked through honestly' implies bad faith. Changed to 'consistently'.
HOL-TONE: 'appear strategic' attributes intent. Reframed as 'have a disproportionate effect on headline metrics'.
SEC-6.6: accuracy argument should lead with 4+ variant figures disagreeing, not 'manually entered HTML'. Assigned to analyst EXP-165.
SEC-6.6: denominator exclusion defense not preempted. Needs protocol-deviation-after-unblinding analogy. Assigned to analyst EXP-165.

SEC-6.6 dedup: WIN-068 shares eclipse magnetometer domain with cluster [010,025] but is not in it. Adding it would change cluster 2→1 to 3→1, reduce unclustered 32→31, INDEPENDENT_CLAIMS 42→41. Needs human decision before executing — requires coordinated change to generate-html.js dedupClusters and sections.json table.
